title: pyrus × canescens
intro: Pyrus × canescens, also known as the hawthorn berry, is a hybrid species of the rose family that is commonly found in various parts of the world. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, particularly oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs). The health benefits of Pyrus × canescens include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart-related issues. Pyrus × canescens is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a fresh or dried fruit, either on its own or as part of a combination herbal supplement.
